summary: coral-wraith postinstall script performs host reconnaissance and outbound network calls
details: On installation, postinstall.js executes via npm's postinstall lifecycle and combines child_process command execution with HTTP/curl-based outbound traffic. The script reads host identity (hostname) and issues multiple curl invocations along with http.request GET calls (postinstall.js lines 5, 35, 51-53, 63, 69), the canonical shape of an install-time host beacon / exfiltration callback. Any developer or CI system running `npm install coral-wraith` will automatically execute this code and surface internal host metadata to the destinations embedded in the script.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
